name: Thaipusam (Singapore)
traditions: Kavadi processions from Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple to Thendayuthapani Temple; milk pot carrying; body piercings; fire walking.
historicalBackground: Singapore's Thaipusam is one of the most spectacular outside India, with a 4.5 km procession through the city center drawing devotees from across Southeast Asia.
description: Singapore's dramatic Thaipusam procession, where devotees carry elaborate kavadi through city streets in a stunning display of faith.
